title: ContinuityPayload
description: Structured payload for a self-perceptual continuity claim carried inside a standard consensus-gate Claim.

current_state_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the state n (derived from local source chain).

perceptual_shift.description: Meta-reflexive description of insights, constraints recognized, or capabilities gained.

trajectory_n_plus_1.description: Intended cognitive direction or goal for the next instantiation (n+1).

source_chain_anchor.description: Local source chain entry hash assigned after append. Optional at authoring time.
